'''Gilker Budz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] working for [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] outside [[Kor Vella/Legends|Kor Vella]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
He was investigating an illegal animal poaching outside of [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]] where the poachers were taking local wildlife for pelts, biomaterial, or sometimes as exotic pets to sell offworld. It had been an ongoing problem and the local populations were falling to dangerous levels by the time that he learned of [[Snee-Roos]], an offworld tourist, who recorded a killing of a [[gronda]]. He hired an individual to retrieve the [[Holorecorder/Legends|holorecording]] from the tourist and bring it to him. Though Gilker thought this would stop the poaching, he later located a secret [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] base who he thought were in fact responsible for the poaching. He once again hired the previous individual, this time to take out the base.

==Behind the scenes==
Gilker Budz appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
